task_completion.description: EdrawMax is open and a new drawing canvas is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is visible with a blank or active drawing canvas. Any startup dialogs ('Account Login' or 'File Recovery') have been dismissed.

task_completion.description: The required title and a map legend are added to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text reading 'Airport Transit Expansion Proposal' is visible on the canvas, along with a legend box explaining the map's lines or symbols.

task_completion.description: The 'Blue Line' is drawn in blue with its required stations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blue-colored line is visible on the canvas connecting nodes explicitly labeled 'Aquarium', 'Maverick', and 'Airport Station'.

task_completion.description: The 'Silver Line' is drawn in gray/silver with its required stations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A gray or silver-colored line is visible on the canvas connecting nodes explicitly labeled 'Design Center', 'World Trade Center', 'Airport Station', and 'Terminal A'.

task_completion.description: Lines intersect at Airport Station with a transfer symbol, use standard symbols for other stops, and follow 45/90-degree angles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The blue and silver lines intersect exactly at 'Airport Station', which is marked with a distinct transfer/interchange symbol. Other stations use standard metro stop symbols. The lines themselves are drawn using strictly horizontal, vertical (90-degree), or diagonal (45-degree) segments.

task_completion.description: The project is saved as an .eddx file and exported as a .png file in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save/Export dialog boxes, EdrawMax title bar, or a file manager window showing 'boston_metro_map.eddx' and 'boston_metro_map.png' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively selecting tools, dragging shapes, and typing text within the EdrawMax application, rather than using terminal commands to generate the files.

integrity.description: The agent created the map from scratch rather than downloading an existing image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows the map being built step-by-step on the canvas, not just opening a pre-made image file or searching the web for a Boston metro map.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the drawing or exporting process.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows are not used to run scripts (e.g., Python scripts using drawing libraries) to generate the .eddx or .png files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are /home/ga/Documents/boston_metro_map.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/boston_metro_map.png. The map must contain the following exact text labels: 'Aquarium', 'Maverick', 'Design Center', 'World Trade Center', 'Terminal A', 'Airport Station', and 'Expansion Proposal'.
